titleStmt.title: SII 41.61: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 61. (A.R. No. 60 of 1905.) Madurai, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On four pillars in the second story of the east gōpura of the Sundaraēśvara temple at Madura

p.hi: Pāṇḍya. Māṟavarman Sundara-pāṇḍya I, Year 10 = 1226 A.D.

summary.p: Full of gaps. Seems to mention gift of a village called Irāmaṉēri as tax-free dēvadāna by the king. Some existing tax-free maḍappuṟam (endowment for maṭha) was excluded from the present gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya
tirumaṭantaiyum pu
vi maṭantayum puyat
tiruppa nāmaruviya kalai
maṭantaiyum jayamaṭan
taiyum nalañciṟappak ko
ḷārnta ciṉappuliyuṅ ko
ṭuñcilaiyuṅ kulain
toḷippa vāḷārnta
poṟkirimēl varikka
yalkaḷ viḷaiyāṭa I

ruṅkaṭal valaiyattiṉi
taṟamperukak karuṅka
li kaṭintu ceṅkol na
ṭappa Orukuṭai niḻali
ru nilaṅ kuḷiramuvakai
t tamuḻu muṟaimaiyil
viḷaṅka nālvakai
vetamun niṉṟuṭaṉvaḷa
ra Aivakai veḻviyu
ñ(e) ceyviṉaiyiyaṟṟa A
ṟuvakaic camaiyamumaḻa
kuṭan tikaḻa Eḻuvakaip
pāṭalu miyaluṭaṉ para
va Eṇṭicaiyaḷavuñ ca
kkarañ cellak ko
ṅkaṇar kaliṅkar ko
calar māḷuvar ciṅka
ḷar teliṅkar ciṉar kuc
carar villavar makatar vi
kkalar cempiyar palla
var mutaliyar pāttiva
rellā Uṟaiviṭa ma
ruḷeṉ ṟoruvar muṉ
ṉoruvar muṟaimuṟai ka

ṇimuṭi Intiraṉ pūṭ
ṭiṭa polaṅkatirā
ramārpiṉiṟ poli
yap paṇimalarttā
marait ticaimukaṉ
paṭaitta maṉuṉeṟi
taḻaippa maṇimuṭi
cūṭap poṉṉicū
ṇāṭṭup puliyāṇaiy
poyakalak kaṉṉicū
ṇāṭṭuk kayalāṇai
kaivarai veñciṉa
vivuḷiyum veḻamu
m parappit tañcaiyu
muṟantaiyum centa
ḻal koḷuttik kāvi
yu nilamum niṉṟuka
viṉiḻappa vāviyuma
ṟu maṇinīr nilaṉaḻi
ttuk kūṭamu māmatilu
ṅ kopuramu māṭaraṅ
kumāṭamu māḷikaiyu
maṇṭamum palaviṭa
ttu toḻutuvanta
ṭaiya nirupar tanto
kaiyar Aḻutakaṇṇī
rāṟu parappak kaḻutai
koṇṭuḻutu kavaṭi
viccic cempiyaṉai
c ciṉamiriyap poru
tu tāmpukavoṭṭi
p paimpoṉmaṇi
muṭi paṟittup pāṇa
ṉukkuk koṭuttaruḷi
p pāṭaruñ ciṟappiṟ paru

ṟ coravaḷavaṉ A
bhiṣeka maṇṭapa
ttu virābhiṣeka
ñ ceytu pukaḻvi
rittu nāḷum pararā
caṉāmat talaipiṭu
ṅki miḷintaṟuka
ṇ matayāṉaimel
koṇṭu nirāḻi vai
yya muḻutum potu
voḻitta kūrāḻiyu
ñ ceyya toḷume
koṇṭu poy Aiya
ppaṭāta Arumaṟai ce
rantaṇarvāḻ tey
vappuliyūrt tiruve
llaiyiṟ pukkup po
ṉṉampalam poli
yavāṭuvār pūvaiyu
ṭaṉ maṉṉun tirumē
ṉi kaṇṭu maṉaṅkaḷit
tuk kolamalar mela
yaṉuṅ kuḷirtuḻāymā
lu maṟiyāmalar ceva
ṭi vaṇaṅki vāṅkuci
ṟaiyaṉṉan tuyilo
ḻiya vaṇṭeḻuppum
pūṅkamalavāvicūḻ
poṉṉamarāpatiyil O
ttulakan tāṅkumuyar
meruvaik kuṉantu vait
taṉaiya cotimaṇi maṇ
ṭapattiruntu colaima
li payiṉṟa coṇāṭu tā
ṉiḻanta mālaimuṭiyun
taravaruka veṉṟaḻaippa

vāḷakirik kappuṟattu
p poṉvaḷavaṉuri
maiyōṭum pukuntu
peṟṟa putalvaṉainiṉ
pēreṉṟu muṉ
kāṭṭi veṟṟiyariya
ṇaikkiḻ viḻntu
toḻutirappat tāṉo
ṭi muṉṉiḻanta vem
maiyelāṅkai
yakalattāṉotakam
paṇṇit taṇṭāramuṭi
yuṭaṉē viṭṭa pukaliṭa
n taṉmār veḷaikkutti
riya Iṭṭapaṭikkeṉṟi
tu piṭipāṭākaveṉpa
poṅku nirñālattup pū
pālar toḷ viḷaṅkac
ceṅkayal koṇṭuṉṟu
n tirumukamum paṇṭiḻan
ta coḷapatiyeṉṉunā
mamun toṉṉakaru miḷa
vaḻaṅki viṭaikoṭuttu
viṭṭaruḷi vākaikkatir
vel vaṭaventar tam pāta
mekattaḷaiyaṇiya virak
kaḻalaṇintu viḷaṅkiya ma
ṇiyaṇi virasimbhāsaṉa
ttu viḷaṅkeḻukavari Iruma
ruṅ kacaippak kaṭaleṉa mu
ḻaṅkuṅ kaḷinalyāṉai va
ṭapula vēntar maṇippuyam
piriyā Ilaku kuḻai Ari
vaiyar toḻutu niṉṟetta
Ulaka muḻutuṭaiyaroṭu
viṟṟaruntaruḷiya śrīko

ccakkaravattikaḷ
coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaru
ḷiya śrīsunnara pāṇṭi
yadevarkku yāṇ
ṭu pattāvatu nāḷ
nūṟṟaimpattu mū
ṉṟiṉil maturō
taya vaḷanāṭṭu mā
ṭakkuḷakkiḻ matu
raikkoyil paḷḷi
yaṟaikkūṭattu pa
ḷḷippiṭa maḻavarāya
nil Eḻuntaruḷiyirun

yāṇṭu 10vatu kārāṇ
mai miyāṭciyum An
tarāyamum Uṭaiya tē
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliṭṭa
paṭikka paṭi
ṅkaḷ maḻa
varāyar vaḷa
taṅkaḷukku Iṉṉāṭ
ṭu Ivar kāṇiyāṉa I
rāmaṉeri nāṉkel
laikkuṭpaṭṭa nilat
til tta
cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ
maṭattu Uṇṇum
tapasyarkku muṭpaṭa
Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭ
ṭa nilam mukkāl ni
kki nikki Uḷḷa ṉilam
Eḻāvatu nāḷ nuṟ
ṟaimpatu mutal kārāṇ

til
cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ ma
ṭattu Uṇṇun tapa
syarkku maṭappuṟa I
ṟaiyiliyāka Iṭ
ṭa nilam mukkālum
nikki nikki Uḷḷa
nilam Eḻāvatu muta
l kārāṇmai miyā
cciyum Antarāya
muṭpaṭat tevatāṉa
Iṟaiyiliyāy I
ṟuppatāka Iṭṭu vi
variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa
Ūrvariyum Ōlai
yum tantom

mai miyāṭciyum Anta
rāyamum Uṭpaṭa tevatā
ṉa Iṟaiyili yiṟu
ppatā
ṉumē vatā
ṉam
yil
tu kālaṭic caṅkaraṉ Aḻaka
ṉāṉa miḻalai maḻavarāyar maḻavarā
yavaḷanā
ṉallūr śrī
vitta
maḻavarāya
muntaruḷiṉār Ivai mi
ḻalaikkūṟṟattuk ki
ḻ tūṟku veṭṭiyūrā
ṉa mummuṭicoḻaṉal
lūr peṭṭaṉūruṭai
yāṉ veṇkāṭu te
vaṉ tirukkāḷāṇ
ṭaiyāṉāṉa kulace
karayātavarājaṉeḻut
tu Ivai tirumal
liṉāṭṭuttaṭaṅ
ṟṟūruṭaiyar teri
ntauyyaṉiṉṉāṭuvāṉā
ṉa kurukulatarajaṉ Eḻut
tu §ivaiaṇṭaṉāṭ
ṭu perumaṇiyāram ni
karili rāyaṉāṉa ma
ḻavarājaṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
